_comment: Example tool registry. Copy to tools.json and configure with real values. Auth credentials are env var NAMES — the AI VM reads the VALUE from process.env. Credentials NEVER appear in protocol messages or audit trail.

tools.name: read_note
tools.description: Read content of an Obsidian note by path

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Create a new note in the vault

tools.name: append_to_daily_note
tools.description: Append content to today's daily note

tools.name: delete_note
tools.description: Permanently delete a note from the vault

tools.name: list_vms
tools.description: List all VMs and containers on the cluster

tools.name: vm_status
tools.description: Get status of a specific VM (CPU, memory, uptime)

tools.name: start_vm
tools.description: Start a stopped VM or container

tools.name: stop_vm
tools.description: Stop a running VM or container
